facilities.name: North Neighborhood Depository & Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Tuesday-Saturday: 9:00 AM-6:00 PM. Closed Monday and Sunday.
facilities.fees: Free for City of Houston residents, with up to four visits per month.
accepted_materials: Up to five automobile tires per visit without rims
facilities.rules: City of Houston residents must show a Texas photo ID plus matching proof of address. Arrive early enough to unload before closing and do not bring commercial vehicles.

facilities.name: Reuse Warehouse
facilities.fees: Free to donate materials. Materials are released to approved nonprofits, schools, universities, and government agencies.
accepted_materials: Whole bricks, pavers, and concrete blocks
not_accepted: Materials for the general public to pick up
facilities.rules: Call ahead before donating unusual materials. The warehouse does not sell items and does not provide general-public pickup.

facilities.name: Environmental Service Center - South
facilities.address: 11500 S Post Oak Rd, Houston, TX 77035
facilities.hours: Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Free for City of Houston residents.
accepted_materials: Up to five tires per residence each month
facilities.rules: Bring a Texas photo ID plus matching proof of City of Houston residency. Pack chemicals upright and use the city guidance before visiting.
facilities.geocode_match: 11500 S POST OAK RD, HOUSTON, TX, 77035

facilities.name: Environmental Service Center - North
facilities.hours: Second Thursday of each month: 9:00 AM-3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Free for City of Houston residents.
accepted_materials: Up to five tires per residence each month
facilities.rules: Bring a Texas photo ID plus matching proof of City of Houston residency. This city site runs only once each month, so confirm the calendar before driving.

facilities.name: Hardy Road Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Call ahead to confirm current public hours and unloading rules.
facilities.fees: Paid disposal by load or weight.
facilities.rules: Cover your load and confirm current payment, material, and vehicle rules before driving.

facilities.name: Atascocita Landfill
facilities.hours: Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM-5:00 PM. Saturday: 7:00 AM-2:00 PM.
facilities.fees: WM charges by load, weight, and material type.
facilities.rules: Use the WM facility page to confirm public access, approved waste streams, and any special-waste paperwork before driving.

facilities.name: Fairbanks Road Recycling & Disposal Facility
facilities.address: 8225 Fairbanks N Houston Rd, Houston, TX 77064
facilities.hours: Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM-5:00 PM. Saturday: 7:00 AM-2:00 PM.
facilities.fees: WM charges by load, material type, and vehicle class.
accepted_materials: Construction site waste free of household and organic waste
facilities.rules: This WM site is oriented toward brush and construction debris. Confirm current public rules and accepted materials before driving.
facilities.geocode_match: 8225 FAIRBANKS N HOUSTON RD, HOUSTON, TX, 77064

facilities.name: Hockley Public Dumpster (Harris County Precinct 4)
not_accepted: Roofing, sheetrock, carpet, concrete, brick, dirt, or mulch
facilities.rules: Homeowners only. No commercial vehicles or box trucks and trailers. One load per day.
